name: Kaspa.org
description: A community website that provides comprehensive information about Kaspa technology and ecosystem, including links to wallets, explorers, development tools, and resources.

name: Kaspa.com
description: Leading Kaspa DeFi Platform with L2 DEX, lending & borrowing, and launchpad. Seamless L1 marketplace for trading KRC-721 NFTs, KRC-20 tokens, and KNS domains on Kaspa’s BlockDAG.

name: KASmedia
description: A media outlet publishing research and articles on Kaspa’s financial markets, distributed systems, and philosophy, while supporting PR, events, and ecosystem collaboration.

name: Kaspa Kii
description: Foundation using Kaspa’s fast DAG-based tech to boost innovation in industry and enterprise, growing a strong ecosystem through events, outreach, and education.

name: Kaspa Eco Foundation
description: Supports Kaspa’s ecosystem growth via grants, events, and community initiatives, publishing monthly reports and news to foster a strong, thriving network.

name: Kasplex
description: First EVM-compatible programmable Layer 2 on Kaspa L1, enabling KRC20 tokens, KRC721 NFTs, and smart contracts with open-source indexer and APIs for scalable dApps.

name: Igra Labs
description: An EVM-compatible programmable Layer 2 on Kaspa L1, enabling smart contracts with atomic composability and interoperability across VMs like Solana VM and WASM for scalable DeFi dApps.

name: KNS
description: Decentralized name service on Kaspa, enabling secure, scalable domain name and arbitrary text inscription for personalized digital identities and asset management.

name: Kasia
description: A peer-to-peer, encrypted messaging protocol and application built on Kaspa, fully open-source and decentralized.

name: KaChat
description: Private, decentralized messaging application powered by the Kaspa network using the Kasia protocol.

name: K
description: A decentralized microblogging platform on Kaspa, leveraging censorship-resistant technology for secure, transparent, and low-cost social interactions with open-source development.

name: Vivoor
description: Kaspa-powered streaming platform, enabling creators to stream live, earn tips, and share clips using Livepeer’s decentralized video infrastructure.

name: KasShi
description: A video platform powered by $KAS micropayments that lets creators earn Kaspa through tipping, channel subscriptions, engagement, and paid videos.

name: Kaspeak
description: A decentralized messenger on the Kaspa network with end-to-end encrypted private messages, groups, channels, and a dedicated SDK for building decentralized applications.

name: Travala.com
description: World’s leading Web3 travel company. Travala.com is a pioneering crypto-native online travel agency that enables users to book millions of hotels, flights, tours, and activities worldwide using Kaspa.

name: KasMart
description: A decentralized marketplace on Kaspa where users can buy and sell physical items, services, NFTs, and gigs using $KAS cryptocurrency.

name: KaspaJobs
description: The first job board for Kaspa-based payments. Browse jobs, post work, find talent, and get paid in KAS.

name: Arkiv File Storage
description: A decentralized P2P file storage system built on the Kaspa BlockDAG, enabling encrypted, permanent file uploads to transaction payloads with free downloads and low miner fees.

name: kas.coffee
description: A platform for creating personalized donation pages to accept Kaspa cryptocurrency instantly, with custom handles, themes, QR code payments, and social media integration.

name: KasMap
description: A community-driven platform for Kaspa, enabling users to find merchants, connect with local communities, join events, compete on leaderboards, try Kaspa apps, and promote real-world $KAS adoption.

name: Kaspa Research
description: A community platform for discussing and developing on Kaspa, covering topics such as consensus, mining, privacy, and more.

name: Kaspa Wiki
description: A wiki page for Kaspa, providing comprehensive documentation and information on the Kaspa blockchain, its protocol, and ecosystem.

name: Kaspa Q&A
description: A community-driven Q&A platform for Kaspa, built on the open-source QPixel engine by Codidact, fostering knowledge sharing about Kaspa’s blockchain, technology, and ecosystem.

name: Kaspa News
description: A comprehensive real-time dashboard aggregating the latest Kaspa news, trending YouTube videos, top tweets, GitHub development activity, Discord updates, and AI-generated sentiment reports all in one place.

name: Kaspa Social
description: A community-driven social media platform for the Kaspa ecosystem, enabling users to share news, articles, X and YouTube content, and engage in forums with minimal moderation and personalized dashboards.

name: KasLens
description: AI-powered tool for real-time Kaspa market analysis, offering sentiment analysis, news summaries, predictive charting, and instant price movement notifications.

name: Kaspa Network Hashrate
description: An interactive visualization tool displaying accurate Kaspa network hashrate data, providing real-time insights and historical measurements since genesis.

name: TTT

name: Flux Kmail
description: A decentralized, wallet-based email application for the Kaspa ecosystem, using wallet addresses as identities for passwordless, secure communication. Open-source, integrating with TTT for app notifications and KAS transfers.

name: OnChain POS
description: A professional point-of-sale system for local businesses to accept cryptocurrency payments directly to their wallet, with real-time blockchain verification.

name: Kaspay POS
description: Non-custodial point-of-sale system for accepting cryptocurrency payments directly to your wallet. Zero platform fees, one-time purchase, offline mode, and support for multiple fiat currencies.

name: Kaskad

name: KYO
description: A Kaspa-based protocol enabling crypto holders to spend and borrow against their assets without selling, offering a seamless card for instant payments and loans while retaining ownership.

name: Overpass Finance
description: A decentralized P2P atomic swap protocol on Kaspa, enabling fast, secure, and trustless cross-chain trading without intermediaries.

name: KASCompute
description: A decentralized compute infrastructure built on Kaspa, enabling nodes to execute deterministic jobs and submit cryptographic proofs of computation for verifiable, trust-minimized work.

name: KasPixel
description: A collaborative canvas where users connect their KasWare wallet, pay for pixels, and place them to create community art, inspired by Reddit’s r/place, highlighting Kaspa’s fast transaction speeds.

name: TX Missile Command
description: A fun, retro-style arcade game where real Kaspa transactions appear as incoming missiles raining down on a city.

name: KasPlay

name: Rock The Kaspa
description: A merchandise shop selling Kaspa-themed clothing, supporting community marketing funds and promoting Kaspa adoption through apparel.

name: Proof of Prints
description: A 3D printing business dedicated to the crypto and tech space, specializing in custom models and prints for the Kaspa ecosystem.

name: Kascoin Shop

name: KaspaShirts
description: High-quality, durable Kaspa-themed T-shirts, polos, and hoodies for men and women, available in sizes S-5XL, featuring a wide range of designs from trendy to minimalistic.

name: KaspaBuy
description: An e-commerce platform for Kaspa-themed physical merchandise, supporting Kaspa payments to promote real-world adoption.

name: SLOWLIKEBTC
description: Print-on-demand store with Bitcoin $SLOW & Kaspa-themed clothing, accessories, & decor, inspired by Kaspa founder’s pet turtle, promoting community & crypto awareness.

name: The Business Directory
description: Decentralized B2B AI directory on Kaspa connecting businesses for networking, collaboration, and growth with AI-driven tools for discovery, insights, automation, and seamless connectivity.

name: SeedBuster
description: Community-powered scam defense platform for the crypto community. It tracks, reports, and helps take down malicious phishing sites targeting Kaspa and other cryptos through automated detection and evidence collection.

name: Kaspa Security Center
description: A community initiative for reporting and investigating security incidents on Kaspa, with public reports, status tracking, and efforts to trace funds and alert exchanges and authorities.

name: KasBay
description: A comprehensive resource hub for the Kaspa ecosystem, featuring projects and dApps across the network to showcase innovation, utility, and growth within the community.

name: KasOS
description: Web3-enabled desktop operating system that runs entirely in your browser. Features a modern desktop interface, Kaspa integration via built-in wallet, file explorer, app store, and tools for building custom dApps.

name: Kasia Book
description: A directory of verified Kasia Messaging users on Kaspa. It lists X (Twitter) handles linked to Kaspa wallet addresses (or KNS names) for secure, scam-resistant discovery and messaging.

name: KasStamp

name: KasProve

name: KaspaTips
description: A platform for creating private, expiring tip pages with QR codes to share Kaspa addresses for requesting tips, donations, invoices, and more via SMS, email, or social media.

name: Zealous Swap
description: The first AMM DEX on Kaspa, pioneering DeFi with lightning-fast, secure token swaps, low fees, seamless decentralized trading, and an innovative NFT-based fee system.

name: Kaspa Finance
description: A DEX and DeFi platform on Kaspa's Kasplex zkEVM, offering fast swaps, liquidity, farms, lending, AI-driven DeFai tools, and a Token Creator Tool for KRC20 and other tokens.

name: KSPR DEX
description: A decentralized exchange and launchpad on Kaspa's Kasplex L2, enabling zero-fee token deployment, V3 AMM liquidity with perpetual creator fees, and in-channel Telegram trading for seamless DeFi access.

name: Moonbound
description: A platform for launching, trading, and earning on the Kaspa network, providing tools for creators to build sustainable DeFi and tokenization projects.

name: SeaSwap
description: A DEX aggregator for the Kaspa ecosystem, built on Igra Labs and Kasplex, enabling seamless trade routing and optimized DeFi trading experiences.

name: KRChange

name: Aporia Exchange

name: Spectre Market

name: Proof of Works

name: Fervent Finance

name: Kurve

name: KAT Bridge

name: Kaspa Bridge

name: Dymension Kaspa Bridge
description: The first decentralized bridge for Kaspa <> Ethereum, powered by Dymension in a trust-minimized multisig mint-and-burn design.

name: Coineo
description: Multi-chain crypto portfolio tracker with advanced analytics, real-time insights, unified dashboard for all wallets, performance charts, and historical holdings visualization. Supports Kaspa, Kasplex, and soon Igra.

name: KaspArchive

name: BitMart
description: BitMart is a Cayman Islands-based exchange platform established in 2017, offering crypto trading and staking services.

name: Tapbit
description: Tapbit is a US-based trading platform founded in 2019, offering crypto spot and futures trading services.

name: Wirex
description: Wirex, based in the United Kingdom, launched 2016 and offers crypto trading, a multi-currency debit card, and wallet services.

name: NOWPayments
description: NOW Payments is a crypto payment gateway supporting Kaspa, ideal for e-commerce and gaming. It offers API integration for online payments and supports donations for non-profits.

name: CoinPal
description: Coin Pal is a secure cryptocurrency payment platform supporting Kaspa, bridging traditional finance and the evolving Web3 world. It offers seamless integration for e-commerce platforms, enabling merchants to accept KAS with low-fee, secure payments and multi-currency conversion options.

name: Cryptocurrency Checkout
description: CryptocurrencyCheckout is a Free to Use, Non-Custodial & Decentralized Payment Gateway providing plugins that make accepting multiple cryptocurrencies for your products and services as easy as entering your wallet addresses.

name: Kaspa REST API
description: The REST-API server for the Kaspa network, providing an HTTP interface to interact with Kaspa nodes. It allows developers to build applications that communicate with the Kaspa blockchain using standard HTTP methods.

name: Kasplex API
description: Official public API for the Kasplex protocol on Kaspa, providing access to KRC-20 token data via an open-source indexer.

name: Kaspa.com API
description: API for the KaspaCom platform, providing real-time data on KRC20 tokens, KRC721 NFTs, and KNS domains. Includes endpoints for trade statistics, floor prices, fulfilled orders, hot mints, open orders, recent mints, collection details, token filtering, and more.

name: KNS API
description: API documentation for Kaspa Name Service (KNS), providing endpoints for querying assets by owner, asset details, domain resolution to addresses, domain availability checks, profile data, and primary name management by owner address or setting for users.

name: Rusty Kaspa
description: The official Rust implementation of the Kaspa full-node and related libraries, designed for high-performance and scalability. It supports the BlockDAG protocol, enabling rapid transaction confirmations and high throughput.

name: WASM32 SDK
description: WASM bindings for Rusty Kaspa, enabling Rust code integration in JavaScript and TypeScript environments. Ideal for developers building Kaspa applications with web compatibility and high performance.

name: Simply Kaspa Indexer
description: A Rust-based PostgreSQL indexer for Kaspa, optimized for concurrency and compatibility with kaspa-rest-server. Ideal for developers needing efficient blockchain data indexing.

name: Kloak Node
description: Non-custodial payjoin coordinator for the Kloak Payment Protocol on Kaspa. Provides a privacy-enhanced fungibility layer by coordinating collaborative transactions that obscure payment links through shared inputs and randomized outputs.

name: Kaspium
description: Lightweight and fast mobile wallet for Kaspa, supporting 12/24-word seed phrases, ideal for daily users making payments.

name: Kaspa Simple Wallet
description: A secure, production-safe JavaScript SDK for generating watch-only Kaspa addresses from extended public keys (KPUB/XPUB/TPUB). Supports major wallet formats, and Legacy KDX.

name: KasPaper
description: A lightweight Go-based tool for generating secure Kaspa paper wallets. It provides a simple way to create offline storage for Kaspa assets by generating seed phrases and printable wallet files. Users can customize the wallet's appearance by editing the template.html file before compilation.

name: Kaspa-ng
description: A desktop application for running a Kaspa p2p node, wallet, and BlockDAG visualizer. Written in Rust, it offers a high-performance interface for managing transactions and exploring the Kaspa network. Suited for developers and enthusiasts seeking a comprehensive tool for decentralized operations, with support for solo mining via a stratum bridge.

name: Kdapp
description: A Rust-based framework for building high-frequency, interactive decentralized applications (k-dApps) on Kaspa's BlockDAG. It supports time-sensitive 'Episodes' like tic-tac-toe, leveraging Kaspa's 10 blocks-per-second capability. Designed for rapid development, it avoids state persistence for simplicity and includes rollback handling for reorgs.

name: NOWNodes
description: NOWNodes provides affordable blockchain developer APIs, offering access to over 100 blockchain RPC nodes and block explorers, including Kaspa, Ethereum, Bitcoin, and more. It supports shared and dedicated nodes, WebSocket connections, and testnet access, making it ideal for developers building on multiple blockchain networks, including Kaspa.

name: Kaspa Payments
description: A WordPress plugin that integrates Kaspa cryptocurrency payments into WooCommerce stores. Non-custodial using KPUB watch-only wallets, generates unique addresses per order, automatic real-time payment detection via Kaspa API, live exchange rates from CoinGecko, QR code support, and automatic order completion.

name: KasPush
description: A simple HTML and JavaScript tool for tracking Kaspa wallet balances with real-time push notifications via Pushcut on iOS. Features multiple wallet support, USD value tooltips, and a clean, offline-capable design. Open-source and plug-and-play for easy setup.

name: Kaspa Register
description: An NFC Point of Sale web app built with Flask, enabling Kaspa payment request URIs to be written to NTAG21x NFC tags using PN532 (Raspberry Pi) or ACR1252 readers. Features a Bootstrap UI for entering AUD amounts, converting to KAS via Coingecko rates, and writing URIs to tags with optional verification.

name: Kaspeak SDK
description: An SDK for developing decentralized applications on the Kaspa network. It simplifies low-level tasks like message handling, cryptography, and transaction management, allowing developers to focus on application logic.

name: Kaspian
description: A self-custodial Kaspa wallet with integrated merchant tools, built using JavaScript (Bun) and Rust (via WebAssembly). It supports wallet creation, transaction management, and merchant payment integrations, making it ideal for developers building user-facing applications or e-commerce solutions on the Kaspa network.

name: Graph Inspector
description: A real-time visualization tool for the Kaspa BlockDAG, built with Go and JavaScript (Node.js). It includes database and API components for analyzing the network's block structure, making it valuable for developers studying Kaspa's DAG-based architecture or building analytical tools for network insights.

name: KaspaCom Wallet
description: An open-source web wallet for the Kaspa network, built with JavaScript and TypeScript, supporting both Layer 1 and Layer 2 transactions. It offers a secure and user-friendly interface for managing KAS assets, sending and receiving funds, and integrating with decentralized applications (dApps).

name: KasOS
description: Web3-enabled desktop operating system that runs entirely in your browser. Features a modern desktop interface, Kaspa integration via built-in wallet, file explorer, app store, and tools for building custom dApps.

name: Kasmage
description: A whimsical, lightweight frog-wizard themed CLI for monitoring Kaspa ($KAS) transactions with live alerts, history, and receipts. Supports real-time transaction streaming, threshold alerts, direction filtering, and TXT/JSON receipt generation.

name: Kaspa REST Proxy
description: A REST to Kaspad wRPC Proxy that mirrors most Rusty Kaspa wRPC operations via HTTP REST endpoints. Simplifies developer integration with Kaspad nodes by allowing standard REST calls instead of WebSocket RPC.

name: Simply Kaspa UTXO Exporter
description: Tool that exports Kaspa UTXO set data (top scripts/rich list and address distribution) by reading Rusty-Kaspad directory in read-only mode.

name: Kaspa Kinesis
description: A serverless multiplayer engine using the Kaspa for verifiable randomness and as a global relay, enabling real-time CGNAT-to-CGNAT connectivity, fair gameplay, full auditability, and zero infrastructure or centralized servers.

name: Kaspa WASM JS Wrapper
description: Browser based JavaScript Wrapper with interactive demos showcasing the Kaspa WASM SDK

name: BLanim
description: BLanim is a Python library that extends the Manim package to provide tools for creating animations of blockchain and blockDAG concepts. It is being utilized in creating educational content related to Kaspa, helping to visualize its BlockDAG architecture.

name: Kaspa Hub Donation Pages
description: Create Kaspa donation page in seconds. Ideal for creators, streamers, developers, and causes to receive tips directly to your own wallet.

name: Kaspa Hub Reviews
description: Evaluate any website by entering its domain and see trust ratings from multiple independent reviewers to spot safe, unrated, or risky projects.

name: Kaspa Hub Articles
description: A collection of articles exploring Kaspa and the cryptocurrency ecosystem, providing insights and practical information for users.

name: Kaspa Hub KRC20 Explorer
description: A dedicated KRC20 token explorer for viewing detailed information on individual tokens deployed on the Kaspa network.

name: Kaspa Hub Overview
description: A visual infographic showing the current state of Kaspa at a glance, with essential technical highlights and a clear map of the growing ecosystem.

name: Kaspa Hub Speed
description: An interactive real-time visualization comparing blockchain block speeds across major networks.
